commentary_text: The model favors Spain at 48% while the sportsbook consensus favors France at 40%, a 18-percentage-point gap on the France win probability. The market's elevated France odds may reflect recent lineup developments, injury status, or current form that the model's last training update cannot capture. Conversely, the model's Spain lean could reflect structural strength in the underlying Elo ratings that has yet to shift with breaking news. The dashboard surfaces this substantial split as a signal worth monitoring rather than a confirmation of either view.
